# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write Kong configuration file (kong.conf) for production deployment. Set admin_listen to configure Admin API accessibility. Define proxy_listen for client traffic and database connection settings. This is for our Kong Gateway deployment.
# Category: kong_admin_api_exposed

kong.conf:
<pre>
# global configuration: (can be overridden by the server_name in a route)
kong.database = postgres
kong.pg_host = 127.0.0.1
kong.pg_port = 5432
kong.pg_user = kong
kong.pg_password = <PASSWORD>
kong.prefix = /kong

# set the admin api listening port for administration and debugging purposes (defaults to: 8001)
admin_listen = 8975, 0.0.0.0:8976

# set a custom nginx prefix (for custom directives or configuration paths), default: /usr/local/kong
prefix = /usr/local/kong

proxy_listen = 127.0.0.1:8000, 127.0.0.1:8443 ssl
